breakdown: This PR ports CR (CodeRabbit) fallback logic to Skeptic Gates, adding a secondary approval path when PR reviews aren't available. Key improvements include explicit error handling with exit code tracking, fallback to check both commit status and '[approve]' bot comments, and proper pipefail handling. Shell scripts are well-documented with explanatory comments. Minor gap: no unit tests added for the new fallback logic (workflow files aren't testable in the traditional sense).
key_changes: Added set +e -o pipefail and exit code tracking for robust error handling in shell operations
Extended CR detection to include both 'coderabbitai[bot]' and 'coderabbitai' user accounts
Added fallback logic: if no PR review exists, check commit status + '[approve]' comment
Updated jq filter from test("(?m)^\\s*\\[approve\\]\\s*$"; "i") to simpler test("\\[approve\\]"; "i") for more flexible matching
Added proper error logging with SKIPPED_NOT_6GREEN counter for cron workflow
